<includeonly><div style="background:#e8f5e9; border:1px solid #a5d6a7; border-radius:4px; padding:4px 10px; margin:4px 0; font-size:0.85em; display:inline-block;">&#x2705; <b>Closed</b></div></includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Closed}}</nowiki></code>

Status marker for resolved questions on talk pages.

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
